objectives.goal: Land on the site and find out how it works
Search for a specific kind of item and open its details
Sort by price and cap results to low-priced lots
Narrow the grid to a single category of interest
friction: Category isolated in one click; settled in 303ms

objectives.goal: Star a lot and find it again after reloading
Open a lot and get a shareable link that reopens it
Use the max-bid calculator to price a flip with a target margin
Complete the core search→detail flow on a phone-sized screen
